summary: The implementation provides a comprehensive WhatsApp-style messaging application with Internet Identity authentication, user profiles, one-to-one and group messaging, file uploads, message editing/deletion, search functionality, emoji picker, responsive UI with dark/light mode, admin panel, and auto-refresh polling. The backend is implemented in a single Motoko actor as required. Most requirements are implemented, with a few gaps in file upload functionality and some admin features.

missing_requirements.requirement: Implement image and file upload system with support for images (JPG, PNG) and documents (PDF, DOC), in-chat image preview, and file download functionality
missing_requirements.reason: FileUploadButton.tsx only sends file metadata as text messages rather than actual file attachments. No image preview or download functionality is implemented. The Message type in backend/main.mo does not include attachment fields.

missing_requirements.requirement: Admin can view list of all users and disable/enable user accounts
missing_requirements.reason: AdminPanel.tsx shows total user and message counts but does not display a list of users or provide UI for disabling/enabling accounts. Backend has isUserActive checks but no exposed methods for listing users or toggling account status.

missing_requirements.requirement: Unread message counter badge appears on conversations with new messages
missing_requirements.reason: ConversationItem.tsx sets unreadCount to 0 with a comment 'Simplified for now'. No logic exists to track or display actual unread message counts.
